message:
feat(ui): modularize error and progress display components

Error display refactoring (rch-common/src/ui/errors/):
- Refactor mod.rs into focused modules
- Add build.rs for build-specific error formatting
- Add config.rs for configuration error display

Progress display (rch-common/src/ui/progress/):
- Enhance mod.rs structure
- Add spinner.rs for animated progress indicators

Client and daemon UI:
- Update rch/src/ui/mod.rs with new imports
- Add rch/src/ui/probe.rs for connection probing display
- Add rchd/src/ui/ daemon UI module

This modularization improves code organization and enables
more specific error messages during compilation operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+//! UI utilities for rchd daemon output.
+//!
+//! This module provides context-aware output utilities for the daemon,
+//! including shutdown sequence display and session summaries.
+//!
+//! # Design Philosophy
+//!
+//! - Output goes to stderr (daemon logs, status messages)
+//! - Must complete even if rich output partially initialized
+//! - Plain text fallback for degraded terminal state
+//! - Version included in final message for troubleshooting
+
+pub mod shutdown;
+
+pub use shutdown::{JobDrainEvent, SessionStats, ShutdownSequence};
